EasyUseAnimaPromptCorrector.description: 整理 ANIMA 提示词文本，保留自然语言大小写，按已知 ANIMA 分区顺序重新排列，并报告未知标签和重复标签。

prompt.name: 提示词
prompt.tooltip: Comma-separated prompt text to normalize and reorder for ANIMA.

artist_overrides.name: 作者处理标签
artist_overrides.tooltip: Comma- or newline-separated manual triggers to treat like artist tags.

artist_exclusions.name: 作者排除标签
artist_exclusions.tooltip: Comma- or newline-separated triggers that must not be treated as artists.

0.name: 校正后提示词
0.tooltip: Prompt text after ANIMA ordering and syntax cleanup.

1.name: 报告
1.tooltip: JSON report containing changed state, unknown tags, duplicate tags, warnings, and sections.

EasyUseAnimaWildcard.description: 基于种子展开 EasyUse Anima 通配符文件和动态提示词语法。

text.name: 文本
text.tooltip: Prompt text with wildcard syntax such as __style__ or {2::a|5::b|c}.

populated_text.name: 已填充文本
populated_text.tooltip: Cached expanded prompt used by fixed and reproduce modes.

mode.name: 模式
mode.tooltip: 普通填充使用基于种子的随机展开。固定/复现使用缓存文本。顺序模式使用 seed % 项目数作为索引。

seed.name: 种子
seed.tooltip: 通配符选择种子。顺序模式会对每个通配符使用 seed % 项目数作为索引。

seed_after_generate.name: 生成后种子控制
seed_after_generate.tooltip: 生成后的种子控制：固定、随机化、递增或递减。

1.name: 种子
1.tooltip: Seed after applying the seed control option.

EasyUseAnimaPromptBuilder.description: 将质量标签、触发词、LoRA 触发词、正文和后置标签组合为适合 ANIMA 的提示词，并同时生成元数据和 Mod Guidance 输出。

use_anima_mod_guidance.name: 使用 Mod Guidance
use_anima_mod_guidance.tooltip: true: output prompt excludes quality fields and sends them through anima_mod_guidance_quality_tags.

pin_trigger_tags_to_front.name: 将触发词固定到前方
pin_trigger_tags_to_front.tooltip: true: keep trigger/artist and LoRA trigger fields at the very front instead of placing quality tags before them.

lora_trigger_tags.name: LoRA 触发词标签
lora_trigger_tags.tooltip: One-line trigger tags received from a LoRA manager or pasted manually.

quality_tags.name: 质量标签
quality_tags.tooltip: Leading quality tags. With AMG enabled, these are excluded from prompt output.

prompt.name: 提示词
prompt.tooltip: Main prompt body. This is the expected place for NAIA output.

0.name: 提示词
0.tooltip: Final positive prompt. When Mod Guidance is enabled, leading quality tags are excluded.

1.name: Mod Guidance 质量标签
1.tooltip: Quality prompt text intended for Anima Mod Guidance.

2.name: 使用 Mod Guidance
2.tooltip: Boolean flag passed through for Anima Mod Guidance workflow control.

3.name: 元数据提示词
3.tooltip: Prompt text for metadata, independent from Mod Guidance routing and metadata filters.

EasyUseAnimaPromptStudio.description: 在 Prompt Builder 上增加前端编辑、自动补全和标签高亮辅助的节点。

use_anima_mod_guidance.name: 使用 Mod Guidance
use_anima_mod_guidance.tooltip: true: output prompt excludes quality fields and sends them through anima_mod_guidance_quality_tags.

pin_trigger_tags_to_front.name: 将触发词固定到前方
pin_trigger_tags_to_front.tooltip: true: keep trigger/artist and LoRA trigger fields at the very front instead of placing quality tags before them.

lora_trigger_tags.name: LoRA 触发词标签
lora_trigger_tags.tooltip: One-line trigger tags received from a LoRA manager or pasted manually.

quality_tags.name: 质量标签
quality_tags.tooltip: Leading quality tags. With AMG enabled, these are excluded from prompt output.

prompt.name: 提示词
prompt.tooltip: Main prompt body. This is the expected place for NAIA output.

0.name: 提示词
0.tooltip: Final positive prompt. When Mod Guidance is enabled, leading quality tags are excluded.

1.name: Mod Guidance 质量标签
1.tooltip: Quality prompt text intended for Anima Mod Guidance.

2.name: 使用 Mod Guidance
2.tooltip: Boolean flag passed through for Anima Mod Guidance workflow control.

3.name: 元数据提示词
3.tooltip: Prompt text for metadata, independent from Mod Guidance routing and metadata filters.

EasyUseAnimaPromptStudioAdvanced.display_name: Anima 提示词工作室高级版
EasyUseAnimaPromptStudioAdvanced.description: 提供可排序的正向/负向输入字段、NAIA 填充、触发词输入、Mod Guidance 路由、元数据输出和 Latent 分辨率输出的高级 Prompt Studio。

use_naia.name: 使用 NAIA
use_naia.tooltip: Internal request flag. The front-end exposes this as the NAIA Prompt field's 'Fill from NAIA' button, which fills that field with a fresh NAIA random prompt.

consume_naia_on_queue.name: 应用 NAIA 一次
consume_naia_on_queue.tooltip: Internal one-shot mode. Successful NAIA fills are saved with the request flag off so loaded workflows reuse the stored prompt.

use_anima_mod_guidance.name: 使用 Mod Guidance
use_anima_mod_guidance.tooltip: true: positive output excludes quality fields and sends them through the mod guidance quality output.

resolution_size.name: 分辨率尺寸
resolution_size.tooltip: Internal selected latent resolution, formatted as width * height (ratio).

resolution_custom_width.name: 自定义宽度
resolution_custom_width.tooltip: Internal custom latent width. Values are snapped to multiples of 32.

resolution_custom_height.name: 自定义高度
resolution_custom_height.tooltip: Internal custom latent height. Values are snapped to multiples of 32.

pin_trigger_tags_to_front.name: 将触发词固定到前方
pin_trigger_tags_to_front.tooltip: Legacy internal flag. Trigger field Pin buttons control trigger placement.

advanced_fields.name: 高级字段
advanced_fields.tooltip: Internal JSON payload for Advanced Prompt Studio fields.

use_negative_anima_mod_guidance.name: 使用负向 Mod Guidance
use_negative_anima_mod_guidance.tooltip: true: negative output excludes negative quality fields and sends them through the negative Mod Guidance output.

wildcard_mode.name: 通配符模式
wildcard_mode.tooltip: 通配符模式。固定是兼容默认值；顺序模式使用 seed % 项目数，并在队列执行后递增种子。

wildcard_seed.name: 通配符种子
wildcard_seed.tooltip: Advanced Prompt Studio 字段使用的通配符种子。

wildcard_seed_after_generate.name: 通配符种子生成后控制
wildcard_seed_after_generate.tooltip: 通配符生成后的种子控制。

0.name: 正向提示词
0.tooltip: Final positive prompt assembled from enabled positive fields.

1.name: 负向提示词
1.tooltip: Final negative prompt assembled from enabled negative fields.

2.name: Mod Guidance 质量标签
2.tooltip: Positive quality fields routed to Anima Mod Guidance.

3.name: Anima Mod Guidance 负向提示词
3.tooltip: Negative quality fields routed to Anima Mod Guidance.

4.name: 使用 Mod Guidance
4.tooltip: Boolean flag passed through for Anima Mod Guidance workflow control.

5.name: 使用负向 Mod Guidance
5.tooltip: Boolean flag passed through for negative Anima Mod Guidance workflow control.

6.name: 元数据提示词
6.tooltip: Positive metadata prompt with metadata filters applied.

7.name: 元数据负向提示词
7.tooltip: Negative metadata prompt with metadata filters applied.

EasyUseAnimaPromptStudioRegional.display_name: Anima 提示词工作室 Regional
EasyUseAnimaPromptStudioRegional.description: 将指定正向提示词字段应用到编号用户蒙版的 Regional Prompt Studio。Regional 提示词数据由 Anima Regional Conditioning 节点转换为 KSampler 用 CONDITIONING。

regional_fields.name: Regional 字段
regional_fields.tooltip: Internal JSON payload for Regional Prompt Studio fields.

regional_config.name: Regional 设置
regional_config.tooltip: Internal JSON payload for numbered masks and mask editor settings.

resolution_size.name: 分辨率尺寸
resolution_size.tooltip: Internal selected latent resolution, formatted as width * height (ratio).

resolution_custom_width.name: 自定义宽度
resolution_custom_width.tooltip: Internal custom latent width. Values are snapped to multiples of 32.

resolution_custom_height.name: 自定义高度
resolution_custom_height.tooltip: Internal custom latent height. Values are snapped to multiples of 32.

wildcard_mode.name: 通配符模式
wildcard_mode.tooltip: Wildcard mode for Regional Prompt Studio fields.

wildcard_seed.name: 通配符种子
wildcard_seed.tooltip: Wildcard seed used by Regional Prompt Studio fields.

wildcard_seed_after_generate.name: 生成后通配符种子控制

0.name: 元数据提示词
0.tooltip: Metadata positive prompt with global and mask-scoped prompt fields included.

1.name: 元数据负向提示词
1.tooltip: Negative metadata prompt with metadata filters applied.

2.name: 宽度
2.tooltip: Selected latent width used by the mask editor canvas.

3.name: 高度
3.tooltip: Selected latent height used by the mask editor canvas.

4.name: Regional 提示词数据
4.tooltip: Bundled regional prompt, mask, and model-patch data for Anima Regional Conditioning.

EasyUseAnimaRegionalConditioning.description: Encodes Anima Prompt Studio Regional data with CLIP and creates mask-scoped positive conditioning.

regional_prompt_data.name: Regional 提示词数据
regional_prompt_data.tooltip: 从 Anima Prompt Studio Regional 传递的专用 Regional 提示数据。

clip.name: CLIP
clip.tooltip: CLIP model used to encode the global and regional prompts.

mask_strength.name: 蒙版强度
mask_strength.tooltip: Strength applied to mask-scoped conditioning entries.

set_cond_area.name: Conditioning area
set_cond_area.tooltip: mask bounds mirrors ComfyUI ConditioningSetMask area behavior.

0.name: 正向
0.tooltip: Positive CONDITIONING containing the global prompt plus mask-scoped regional entries.

1.name: 负向
1.tooltip: Negative CONDITIONING encoded from the bundled negative prompt.

EasyUseAnimaDetailerAlignHook.display_name: Anima 细节修复对齐 Hook
EasyUseAnimaDetailerAlignHook.description: 连接到 Impact Pack 细节修复 detailer_hook 输入的尺寸对齐 Hook。使用 Impact Pack 的 touch_scaled_size 扩展点，将 crop sampling 尺寸向上修正到指定倍数。

alignment.name: 对齐倍数
alignment.tooltip: Crop sampling size alignment. 32 is recommended for ANIMA/Spectrum safety; none keeps the original Impact Pack size.

detailer_hook.name: 现有细节修复 Hook
detailer_hook.tooltip: Optional existing Impact Pack detailer hook. It runs before the alignment adjustment.

0.name: 现有细节修复 Hook
0.tooltip: Impact Pack compatible DETAILER_HOOK. Connect it to an Impact DetailerForEach-compatible detailer_hook input.

EasyUseAnimaImageScaleByMultiple.display_name: Anima 图像有效倍率缩放
EasyUseAnimaImageScaleByMultiple.description: 保持原始比例，并使用最接近的有效倍率放大图像，使输出宽度和高度成为指定倍数。设置最大长边后，只会选择不超过该限制的有效尺寸。Highres 或优化节点要求 32 倍数尺寸时使用。

scale_by.name: 缩放倍率
scale_by.tooltip: Requested image scale ratio. The nearest valid ratio for the selected multiple is applied.

multiple.name: 尺寸倍数
multiple.tooltip: Output width and height must be multiples of this value. Use 32 for highres safety.

max_long_edge.name: 最大长边
max_long_edge.tooltip: Maximum output long edge. Set 0 to disable this limit.

0.name: 图像
0.tooltip: Scaled image using the nearest valid ratio.

3.name: 应用倍率
3.tooltip: Actual scale ratio applied to the image.

EasyUseAnimaSAM3Context.description: 通过 ComfyUI 原生检查点加载器加载 SAM3 检查点，并返回包含 SAM3 模型、CLIP、VAE 的 rgthree 兼容 ctx_SAM3。

ckpt_name.name: SAM3 检查点
ckpt_name.tooltip: SAM3 checkpoint to load, for example sam3.1_multiplex_fp16.safetensors.

0.name: ctx_SAM3
0.tooltip: Context dict containing SAM3 model, CLIP, VAE, and checkpoint name.

1.name: SAM3 模型
1.tooltip: SAM3 model loaded from the selected checkpoint.

2.name: SAM3 CLIP
2.tooltip: SAM3 CLIP loaded from the selected checkpoint.

3.name: SAM3 VAE
3.tooltip: VAE loaded from the selected checkpoint.

EasyUseAnimaSAM3Detailer.description: 将 ComfyUI 原生 SAM3 文本检测、Impact Pack MASK to SEGS 和 Impact Pack DetailerForEach 合并为一个细节修复节点。

enabled.name: 启用
enabled.tooltip: Disable to return the original image and an empty SEGS output.

ctx_SAM3.name: ctx_SAM3
ctx_SAM3.tooltip: ctx_SAM3 from Anima SAM3 Context or a compatible rgthree context containing model and clip.

detect_prompt.name: 检测目标
detect_prompt.tooltip: SAM3 text target. Use comma-separated targets or target:count for per-target detection count.

detect_count.name: 检测数量
detect_count.tooltip: Maximum detections per target when detect_prompt does not already include :count.

refine_iterations.name: SAM3 refine 次数
refine_iterations.tooltip: SAM decoder refinement passes. 0 uses raw detector masks.

individual_masks.name: 单独蒙版
individual_masks.tooltip: Ask SAM3 for per-object masks. MaskToSEGS can still split a combined mask by contours.

drop_size.name: 最小区域
drop_size.tooltip: Drop detected regions smaller than this size.

model.name: 模型
model.tooltip: Model passed through to Impact Pack DetailerForEach.

guide_size.name: 导向尺寸
guide_size.tooltip: Target guide size for the detailed crop.

guide_size_for.name: 导向尺寸基准
guide_size_for.tooltip: Use the bbox or crop region as the guide-size basis.

alignment.name: 对齐倍数
alignment.tooltip: Align the Impact detail crop sampling size upward. Use 32 for ANIMA/Spectrum safety, or impact/none for pass-through.

preserve_conditioning_metadata.name: 保留 conditioning 元数据
preserve_conditioning_metadata.tooltip: Reserved safety flag for the native ANIMA backend. The current Impact backend passes conditioning through to Impact Pack.

fail_on_unsupported_opt.name: 未支持选项时报错
fail_on_unsupported_opt.tooltip: Raise an error instead of warning when a native-backend-only option is requested.

0.name: 图像
0.tooltip: Detailed image. If disabled or no SEGS are detected, this is the original image.

1.name: SEGS
1.tooltip: Impact-compatible SEGS generated from the SAM3 mask.

2.name: 蒙版
2.tooltip: SAM3 mask used to build SEGS.

EasyUseAnimaLoraPreset.description: 保存多个 ANIMA LoRA 预设配置，构建 LoRA 堆栈和触发词，并在工作流中保留配置数据。

style_prompt.name: 风格提示词
style_prompt.tooltip: Style prompt for artist tags, model triggers, or short style directions.

profile_index.name: 配置索引
profile_index.tooltip: Selected LoRA preset profile. Can be connected from another node.

profile_count.name: 配置数量
profile_count.tooltip: Internal profile count managed by the front-end profile buttons.

lora_name.name: LoRA 名称
lora_name.tooltip: Internal LoRA selector source. Hidden by the EasyUse Anima front-end.

loras.name: LoRA 列表
loras.tooltip: Internal serialized LoRA rows for the selected profile.

0.name: 风格提示词
0.tooltip: Corrected style prompt for artist tags, model triggers, or short style directions.

1.name: LoRA 堆栈
1.tooltip: LoRA stack compatible with LoRA stack loaders.

2.name: 触发词
2.tooltip: Trigger words collected from selected LoRA metadata.

3.name: 启用的 LoRA
3.tooltip: Text representation of enabled LoRAs and strengths.

4.name: 配置索引
4.tooltip: Currently selected profile index after wrapping to the available profile count.

EasyUseAnimaNAIARandomPrompt.description: 从 NAIA Remote API 请求随机提示词，支持绕过和固定输出复用，并保存生成值以便保存图像工作流复现相同结果。

use_naia_bridge.name: 使用 NAIA Bridge
use_naia_bridge.tooltip: false: bypass NAIA and return prompt/negative_prompt/width/height as-is. This mode keeps ComfyUI cache stable when inputs are unchanged.

freeze_naia_output.name: 固定 NAIA 输出
freeze_naia_output.tooltip: true: if cached output is valid, return it without calling NAIA. Saved-image workflows are written with this enabled.

show_preview.name: 显示预览
show_preview.tooltip: Show the large read-only preview widget in the node UI.

cached_prompt.name: 缓存提示词
cached_prompt.tooltip: Stored prompt used for frozen output and saved-image reproduction.

cached_negative_prompt.name: 缓存负向提示词
cached_negative_prompt.tooltip: Stored negative prompt used for frozen output and saved-image reproduction.

cached_width.name: 缓存宽度
cached_width.tooltip: Stored width used for frozen output and saved-image reproduction.

cached_height.name: 缓存高度
cached_height.tooltip: Stored height used for frozen output and saved-image reproduction.

cached_signature.name: 缓存签名
cached_signature.tooltip: Internal signature for validating cached output.

prompt.name: 提示词
prompt.tooltip: Returned as-is when bypassed or when override_prompt is false.

override_prompt.name: 覆盖提示词
override_prompt.tooltip: true: use NAIA prompt. false: preserve input prompt.

negative_prompt.name: 负向提示词
negative_prompt.tooltip: Returned as-is when bypassed or when override_negative is false.

override_negative.name: 覆盖负向提示词
override_negative.tooltip: true: use NAIA negative prompt. false: preserve input negative_prompt.

width.name: 宽度
width.tooltip: Returned as-is when bypassed or when override_width is false.

override_width.name: 覆盖宽度
override_width.tooltip: true: use NAIA width. false: preserve input width.

height.name: 高度
height.tooltip: Returned as-is when bypassed or when override_height is false.

override_height.name: 覆盖高度
override_height.tooltip: true: use NAIA height. false: preserve input height.

use_naia_settings.name: 使用 NAIA 桌面设置
use_naia_settings.tooltip: true: use NAIA desktop Prompt Engineering settings. false: send this node's pre/post/auto_hide and preprocessing options.

pre_prompt.name: Pre prompt
pre_prompt.tooltip: Used only when use_naia_settings is false.

post_prompt.name: Post prompt
post_prompt.tooltip: Used only when use_naia_settings is false.

auto_hide.name: Auto hide
auto_hide.tooltip: Used only when use_naia_settings is false.

remove_author.tooltip:

0.name: 提示词
0.tooltip: Prompt text from NAIA or the original input when bypassed or not overridden.

1.name: 负向提示词
1.tooltip: Negative prompt text from NAIA or the original input when bypassed or not overridden.
